name: kpneumo_hs11286_KPC_carbapenemase_Tn4401
description: Tn4401 transposon carrying blaKPC-2 (Klebsiella pneumoniae carbapenemase) on the HS11286 plasmid pKPHS2 — included here as a chromosomal-context reference; the real locus sits on the plasmid. Tn4401 is ~10 kb, IS6/Tn3-derived, and the major vehicle of KPC dissemination worldwide.
